title: NaviSE: superenhancer navigator integrating epigenomics signal algebra.
author: Ascension AM Arrospide-Elgarresta M Izeta A Arauzo-Bravo MJ
content:
S-EPMC5461685 PMC5461685 NaviSE: superenhancer navigator integrating epigenomics signal algebra.

Background

Superenhancers are crucial structural genomic elements determining cell fate, and they are also involved in the determination of several diseases, such as cancer or neurodegeneration
